cloudfront.continuousdeploymentpolicy.si: This configuration determines the percentage of HTTP requests that are sent to the staging distribution.

cloudfront.continuousdeploymentpolicy.si.Description: Session stickiness provides the ability to define multiple requests from a single viewer as a single session. This prevents the potentially inconsistent experience of sending some of a given user's requests to your staging distribution, while others are sent to your primary distribution. Define the session duration using TTL values.
The percentage of traffic to send to a staging distribution, expressed as a decimal number between 0 and .15.
